title: Chapter 65
content:
Chapter 65: Upgrade [2]

[Player has leveled up]

Those words lingered in the air as Denzel stared at the system notification in utter disbelief.

"What the absolute fuck, is this for real?"

He rubbed his eyes once, then looked again at the system notifications, as if expecting them to vanish.

But they didn’t.

If anything, more kept appearing.

Calling it "good news" almost felt like an understatement.

But right at that moment, the next notification appeared clearly:

[Player has received new title: Marathon Man]

[Description: Player completed high end sexual activity without rest.]

[Player has received new reward: Healing gem]

[Rank: F]

[Description: This stone involuntarily heals players minor injuries, whether created during sexual tension or battle]

’Wow...that reward doesn’t sound so bad if I do say so myself. I wonder if that means it can help refine my semen and lipido so as to better enhance my next marathon.’

"Hmm...hehe...Marathon Man, ehh? Has a ring to it..."

Another followed immediately.

[Player has received +30 Taboo Points.]

Then another.

[Player has received bonus reward: +10 Taboo Points.]

And then again:

[Player has leveled up.]

Denzel exhaled sharply.

"My goodness, my goodness."

’Who knew spending the night with my sexy mummy would end up being this beneficial for my progression?’

"Forty Taboo Points, seriously?"

He let out a low chuckle, still scanning through the notifications.

Then his gaze dropped further.

Another message appeared slightly different from the rest, yet unmistakably from the system.

[Elements unlocked. Player has received mana upgrade.]

He paused.

"Mana upgrade? What the hell is this?"

He stared at it in silence, almost unable to process it.

’These rewards are way too good to be real...’

A quiet laugh slipped out of him.

And right then, the system notification popped out an interface displaying Denzel’s stats.

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 years]

[Strength: 50]

[Agility: 20]

[Sense: 40]

[Vitality: 20]

[Stamina: 30]

[Mana: 15/15]

[Rank: D]

[Harem: 2]

[Taboo Points: 50]

| [Titles Acquired: [The Motherfucker] [Marathon Man]] |

Denzel let out a long breath and forced himself to steady his thoughts.

’All right calm down, Denzel. Step by step.’

His eyes scanned his stats again.

’Forty Taboo Points’

"System, I should probably use them."

He hesitated briefly, thinking it through.

’I don’t even need to overthink it. Vitality first.’

’After last night I definitely felt the difference in bed when I fucked the hell out of Maria. Hell, I was literally able to go all night. If I can push my stats further, it’ll only get better. That means, I’ll be able to get a lot more cum off mum.’

A faint smirk formed on his lips.

’Yeah that’s worth investing in.’

"System, allocate twenty points to Vitality."

Instantly, a new notification appeared.

[20 Taboo Points have been allocated to Vitality]

Denzel nodded slowly, taking in the satisfaction of his well earned points.

"Good now all that’s left is Agility. My agility is kind of poor, honestly. But so is my stamina. Hmm I suppose it’s best to bring the two of them up evenly since I still have 30 Taboo Points left."

"System, allocate 10 points to Stamina and 20 points to Agility," he said.

Without a moment to waste, the system responded.

[20 points have been allocated to Agility.]

[10 points have been allocated to Stamina.]

"Good, good. Very good."

He nodded slowly, clearly satisfied with the decision.

Then another thought crossed his mind.

’So now what do I get from the rank upgrade system?’

Almost instantly, another system notification appeared before him.

[System rewards vary based on the player’s current rank. Player has unlocked an element due to ranking up within a short period. Would the player like to view his Elemental now?]

Denzel’s eyes narrowed slightly as he read the message.

’Elemental?’

His thoughts began to race.

’This really is a huge advantage but what exactly is it going to be? Fire? Water?’

’Whatever it is, if I can master it, it’ll massively increase my strength.People like Patrick already prove it. His attacks alone are insane.’

’And I know he’s strong, but with an elemental boost... he was able to take down Aisha’s guards so easily.’

’If I can get something like that, I’ll be on that level or probably even above that’

A quiet chuckle escaped him.

"Alright"

’There are so many possibilities within this system.’

"Tell me, what is my ability?"

The moment he spoke, another notification appeared in front of him.

Silence followed.

Denzel stared at it.

Then read it once.

Then again.

Then a third time.

"...."

His eyes widened slightly in disbelief.

[Player has no magic abilities of his own.]

He froze completely.

"Huh? Is this some kind of joke? Is the system trying to mess with me?"

He exhaled sharply, frustration creeping into his voice.

"You just told me I unlocked an element and now you’re saying I have no abilities?"

He dragged a hand down his face.

"This doesn’t make any sense."

Then he looked back up at the screen.

"So if I have no abilities then. System, what exactly is my element?"

Right then, another notification appeared in front of him

[Element: Fallacy. Description: The Zeroeth Element (0th). The player cannot directly generate or manifest elements. Instead, the player can only manipulate elements created or controlled by others. However, the player possesses a unique authority over elemental states capable of refining, altering, and forcing any existing element toward its theoretical "final form," with effectiveness scaling according to mastery level.]

Denzel stared at the floating text, his mind momentarily refusing to process what he was seeing.

’Zeroeth element?’

He read it again.

Slower this time. More carefully. As if repetition alone might unlock a clearer meaning.

Then it hit him.

A sharp breath caught in his throat.

His entire body trembled faintly not from fear, but from the sheer weight of what he was beginning to understand.

"What the hell" he muttered under his breath, eyes still locked on the system window.

For a brief moment, silence swallowed everything.

Then slowly, a grin spread across his face.

"This is so peak."
